eventName: Building RAG Pipelines: From Prototype to Production
description: A hands-on evening workshop where you'll build a working RAG pipeline from scratch. We'll cover chunking strategies, embedding models, vector stores, and retrieval optimization. Bring your laptop — you'll leave with running code.
targetAudience: Intermediate Python developers with basic LLM API experience

suggestedSpeakers.name: Sarah Chen
suggestedSpeakers.reason: RAG pipelines are her core expertise. Has given 12 talks and runs a blog on practical RAG patterns.

suggestedSpeakers.name: Jordan Kim
suggestedSpeakers.reason: Can demo self-hosted embedding models as an alternative to API-based ones. Good hands-on workshop facilitator.

suggestedVenue.name: Community Maker Space
suggestedVenue.reason: Every seat has a monitor and power — essential for a hands-on coding workshop. Capacity 40 fits the 35 estimate with room.
